markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Audit and improve the Biologica content pipeline, focusing on proofreader and structural issues.](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline needs refinement: hyperlink handling, proofreader simplification, and structure generation require attention](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [New instructions added for brand name ingredient retrieval to reduce downstream corrections](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Team identified potential oversimplification in proofreader step, leading to one-sentence paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=4387.0)
  - [Content framework updated to specify 2-3 paragraphs per section, aiming for \~100 words each](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5905.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Audit and Improvements

  - [Identified issues with hyperlink handling in proofreader step](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=4433.0)
  - [Removed unnecessary steps (e.g., bullet point creation) to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Added instruction to retrieve brand names for ingredients in research step](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Discussed moving MD-tagging step after proofreader to avoid reflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [Considered adding image generation step to pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=3536.0)

### Proofreader Concerns

  - [Observed tendency to oversimplify content, creating one-sentence paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=4387.0)
  - [Discussed potential causes: interpretation of "dense" text, lack of quantifiable metrics](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5734.0)
  - [Identified problematic words triggering rewrites: "natural" and "dense"](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5802.0)
  - [Planned to adjust article structure requirements to prevent oversimplification](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5856.0)

### Knowledge Base and Research Integration

  - [Noted importance of knowledge base for accurate product information](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=3636.0)
  - [Discussed potential conflicts between web-based fact-checking and proprietary info](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Considered adjusting fact-checker to incorporate knowledge base alongside web sources](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)

### Content Structure and Length

  - [Updated content framework to specify 2-3 paragraphs per section](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5905.0)
  - [Aimed for \~100 words per paragraph, totaling about 1,200 words per article](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5972.0)
  - [Discussed placement and generation of key takeaways section](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=6077.0)

### Pipeline Execution and Monitoring

  - [Noted need for better visibility into pipeline run dates/times](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=3914.0)
  - [Discussed importance of monitoring fact-checker outputs, especially with EXA integration](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=4139.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Meet with Kirkland to discuss pipeline improvements and image integration](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=6580.0)
  - [Implement changes to proofreader step to prevent oversimplification](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=4674.0)
  - [Adjust fact-checker to incorporate knowledge base alongside web sources](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Monitor pipeline outputs closely after implementing changes](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=6573.0)
  - Consider creating a CTA library in the knowledge base for reference
  - [File ticket for adding date/time stamps to pipeline run information](https://fathom.video/share/sTYc2_gMg-rgADvWnC-PKigQsbjDGnoi?tab=summary&timestamp=3947.0)
